---
title: "Gastric Neuroendocrine Tumors"
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: c/t
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    logo: "atriumlogo.jpg"
    footer: "[GI Surgical Oncology Talks](https://gisurgonc.github.io/talks/)"
    css: "lci_styles.css"
    theme: [simple, lci.scss]
    echo: false
  #nanotes_pdf: default
  pdf:
    includes:
      in-header: "preamble.tex"
  #pptx: 
    #reference-doc: talks.pptx
editor: visual
bibliography: zotero.bib
---

## Neuroendocrine Tumors

Low Grade G1: Ki-67 \<3%

Intermediate Grade G2: Ki-67 3-30%

High Grade G3: Ki-67 \>30%

Obstructing carcinoid with liver mets -\> small bowel resection with cholecystectomy and resection of mesentery
